generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuationController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller interfacing with permanent magnet synchronous motors for speed regulation via ROS2-based control logic executed on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Servo mechanism controlled via Jetson Orin Nano's ROS2 nodes for directional adjustment as part of ACC implementation"
]

instance JetsonOrinNanoComputeModule : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer executing real-time control logic for both motor actuation and steering servo commands through ROS2 nodes"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "3D environmental perception sensor generating raw point cloud data at ~30Hz for object detection and tracking"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LidarPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Depth camera capturing visual data streams for supplementary perception tasks alongside LiDAR data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraFrames
]

instance VehicleStateSensors : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensors including wheel encoders and IMU providing vehicle state telemetry (speed, steering angle) at ~30Hz"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateTelemetry
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Data Transmission
instance LidarPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthCameraFrames : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera
]

instance VehicleStateTelemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensors
]

instance ProcessedObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionEvents : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalTwinEntity
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Density-based spatial clustering algorithm implemented in Python for LiDAR point cloud segmentation within Physical Twin Entity"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "State estimation filter for object tracking using processed LiDAR data and vehicle state telemetry in Physical Twin Entity"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance PIDMotorControllerModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Proportional-Integral-Derivative controller for motor voltage regulation implemented in C++ for Jetson Orin Nano"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CPlusPlusROS2Nodes
]

instance PIDSteeringControllerModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "PID controller for steering servo commands implemented in C++ for Jetson Orin Nano"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CPlusPlusROS2Nodes
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622 Performance Class I compliant Adaptive Cruise Control logic executed in Digital Twin Entity"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance DataCollectionPipelineModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ROS2-based data pipeline for aggregating ego vehicle state and object tracks from Physical Twin Entity"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance ReportingSchemaModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SQL database schema for structured storage of time-series data including object tracks and vehicle state metrics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ROS2 + Python/C++ based 3D rendering framework for visualizing ego vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance ControlPanelUIModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "UI framework for remote ACC control including enable/disable toggles, speed adjustment sliders, and emergency braking commands"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance RawLidarPointClouds : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Unprocessed 3D point cloud data streams from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LidarPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANClusteringModel
]

instance DepthCameraImageFrames : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw RGB-D image frames from Intel Deepsense D435i depth camera"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthCameraFrames
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance VehicleStateTelemetryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed vehicle state data including speed and steering angle measurements at ~30Hz"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateTelemetry
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterModel, PIDMotorControllerModel, PIDSteeringControllerModel
]

instance ProcessedObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Filtered and tracked vehicle/obstacle data generated by DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering in Physical Twin Entity"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProcessedObjectTracks
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlModel, DataCollectionPipelineModel
]

instance ACCControlCommands : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Generated control commands (speed adjustments, braking) from Digital Twin Entity's ACC logic"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProcessedObjectTracksData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE
]

instance TimeSeriesReportData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured time-series database records containing object tracks and vehicle state metrics for post-analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DataCollectionPipelineModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportingSchemaModel
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 framework enabling inter-node communication and lifecycle management across all entities"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, SimulationAssistedDevelopmentService
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Onboard microcomputer executing ROS2 nodes for real-time control logic and perception processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables PhysicalTwinEntity, DataTranslationFE
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonNXAntenna : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Wireless communication interface enabling data transmission between Physical Twin Entity and Digital Twin Entity"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationFE
]

instance Python38Development : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 runtime environment for rapid prototyping of perception algorithms (DBSCAN, Kalman filtering)"
    DTDFVocab:enables DBSCANClusteringModel, KalmanFilterModel, ThreeDVisualizationModel
]

instance CPlusPlusROS2Nodes : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ implementation environment for ROS2 node lifecycle management and performance-critical control logic"
    DTDFVocab:enables PIDMotorControllerModel, PIDSteeringControllerModel, ControlPanelUIModel
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation environment for complex perception tasks including point cloud processing and algorithm validation"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationAssistedDevelopmentService
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Structured query language database for storing time-series data and generating human-readable reports"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Cross-system functional entity responsible for serialization/deserialization of data streams between Physical Twin and Digital Twin Entities"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization service providing 3D rendering of ego vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path via ROS2 + Python/C++"
    DTDFVocab:provides ThreeDVisualizationInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service executing ACC logic in Digital Twin Entity while delegating actuation commands to Physical Twin Entity's Jetson Orin Nano"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionAction, SafeFollowingDistanceCalculationAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling full remote control over ACC functionality including enable/disable toggles, speed adjustments, and emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlPanelAction
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service automatically generating human-readable time-series reports of object tracks and vehicle state for post-analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalInsightsReport, MaintenanceAlertsReport
]

instance SimulationAssistedDevelopmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service integrating MATLAB/Simulink for complex perception tasks to offload compute from onboard vehicle systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerceptionAlgorithmValidationAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance ThreeDVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of ego vehicle state, detected objects, and projected driving path for operator monitoring"
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic detection of lead vehicles in the driving path using processed sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SafeFollowingDistanceCalculationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Calculation of optimal following distance based on lead vehicle speed and relative position"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic generation of emergency braking alerts when proximity violations are detected"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCControlPanelAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote execution of ACC commands including enable/disable toggles, speed adjustments, and emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance OperationalInsightsReport : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Time-series report containing fuel economy optimization metrics and vehicle performance analytics"
]

instance MaintenanceAlertsReport : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance alerts including brake wear detection and permanent magnet synchronous motor health monitoring"
]

instance PerceptionAlgorithmValidationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Validation of perception algorithms (DBSCAN, Kalman filtering) through simulation-assisted development"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C18: Entities (Physical/Digital/User)
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Single onboard entity hosting sensors, actuators, and pre-processing logic (DBSCAN, Kalman filtering) for real-time perception"
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera, VehicleStateSensors,
                 MotorActuationController, SteeringServoActuator, JetsonOrinNanoComputeModule
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalSystem
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Single cloud/edge entity executing ACC logic, data collection, and reporting services"
    base:contains ACCControlModel, DataCollectionPipelineModel, ReportingSchemaModel
    base:isContainedIn DigitalSystem
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Single remote UI entity providing 3D visualization and control panel components"
    base:contains ThreeDVisualizationModel, ControlPanelUIModel
    base:isContainedIn UserInterfaceSystem
]

// C19: Entity Relationships
instance DataTransmissionLink : DTDFVocab:EntityRelationship [
    base:desc "ROS2-based communication channel with Wi-Fi (UDP/TCP) protocol enabling real-time data exchange at ~30Hz"
    DTDFVocab:connects PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationFE
]

instance ControlLink : DTDFVocab:EntityRelationship [
    base:desc "Remote control interface enabling operator commands to be executed on Digital Twin Entity's ACC logic"
    DTDFVocab:connects UserEntity, DigitalTwinEntity
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance PhysicalSystem : DTDFVocab:System [
    base:desc "Physical vehicle system containing all onboard components"
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance DigitalSystem : DTDFVocab:System [
    base:desc "Digital twin system containing cloud/edge components"
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance UserInterfaceSystem : DTDFVocab:System [
    base:desc "User interface system containing remote control components"
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment UserEntity
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The interactions from the virtual twin to the physical twin include:
  - **Desired speed commands** computed by the **Controlling FE** (ACC logic) in the Digital Twin Entity, serialized via **Data Translation FE**, and transmitted over **Wi-Fi** to the **Physical Twin Entity**.
  - **Actuation commands** (motor voltage, steering angle) generated by the **Actuation FE** in the Physical Twin Entity, executed via the **Vedder Speed Controller** and **steering servo**.
  - **Emergency braking commands** sent remotely via the **User Entity’s Control Panel** to halt the vehicle instantaneously.
  - **Latency-bound responses** constrained to **≤100 ms end-to-end delay** (per **3GPP TS 22.185** for V2V communication)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates at **real-time synchronization** with the physical twin, adhering to the following time-scale constraints:
  - **Perception cycle rate**: ~30 Hz for **LiDAR** and **depth camera** data acquisition.
  - **Control loop rate**: ~10 Hz for **ACC computation** (lead vehicle detection and speed regulation).
  - **Actuation response time**: ≤100 ms **end-to-end latency** (vehicle-to-DT-to-vehicle) as per **3GPP TS 22.185**.
  - **Clock synchronization**: Devices synchronized to **±100 ms accuracy** (hardware-limited) for event ordering and coordination.
  - **Data storage rate**: Real-time ego vehicle state and object tracks logged at **perception cycle frequency** for report generation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin constellation is orchestrated as a **three-entity system** aligned with **ISO 23247**, with the following components and interactions:
  1) **Physical Twin Entity** (onboard vehicle):
     - Hosts **sensors (LiDAR, camera)**, **actuators (motor, steering servo)**, and **pre-processing logic** (DBSCAN, Kalman filtering).
     - Communicates via **ROS2** with **Digital Twin Entity** over **Wi-Fi**.
  2) **Digital Twin Entity** (cloud/edge):
     - Executes **ACC logic**, **data collection**, and **reporting**.
     - Interfaces with **User Entity** via **ROS2** for visualization and control.
  3) **User Entity** (remote UI):
     - Provides **3D Visualization** and **Control Panel** for remote management.
     - **Data Translation FE** serializes/deserializes data between entities.
  The constellation adheres to **modularity and loose coupling principles**, with **ROS2** enabling cross-entity communication. **Clock synchronization (±100 ms)** and **latency constraints (≤100 ms)** are enforced for real-time operation."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin supports **operational and developmental lifecycle stages** of the physical twin:
  - **Design/Development Phase**: Used as a **cyber-physical experimentation facility** for ACC logic validation and **3D CAD-integrated simulation** (via **MATLAB/Simulink**).
  - **Operational Phase**: Enables **real-time monitoring**, **remote management**, and **predictive maintenance** (e.g., brake system health tracking via integrated simulators).
  - **Lifecycle Management**: Facilitates **digital thread integration** for end-to-end information flow, including **data logging**, **reporting**, and **compliance validation** (e.g., ISO 15622 for ACC performance).
  The DT represents the **as-operated** state of the physical twin, with models validated against real-world sensor data."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin achieves fidelity and validity through:
  - **Model Validation**:
    - **ACC logic** validated against **ISO 15622 (Performance Class I)** standards.
    - **Perception models** (DBSCAN, Kalman filtering) validated via **real-world sensor data** from LiDAR/camera.
  - **Data Accuracy**:
    - **Object tracks** generated with **≤100 ms timestamp synchronization** for temporal consistency.
    - **Actuation commands** validated for **≤100 ms latency** compliance (3GPP TS 22.185).
  - **Uncertainty Mitigation**:
    - **Clock drift compensation** via **hardware-limited ±100 ms synchronization**.
    - **Sensor noise filtering** via **Kalman filtering** in the Physical Twin Entity.
  - **Verification Mechanisms**:
    - **ROS2 lifecycle management** ensures node reliability.
    - **SQL database logs** enable post-hoc validation of data streams.
  - **Uncertainty Sources**:
    - **Hardware limitations** (e.g., ±100 ms clock accuracy) may introduce minor temporal inconsistencies.
    - **Network jitter** in Wi-Fi communication could affect real-time performance (mitigated by latency constraints)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin employs the following technical connection details:
  - **Network Protocols**:
    - **ROS2** for intra-entity communication (e.g., Physical Twin ↔ Digital Twin).
    - **Wi-Fi (UDP/TCP)** for inter-entity communication (vehicle ↔ cloud/edge), with **≤100 ms end-to-end latency**.
    - **Data Translation FE** serializes data streams (e.g., **ROS2 messages → custom binary format** for cross-platform compatibility).
  - **Communication Architecture**:
    - **Decentralized ROS2 network** for local (onboard) communication.
    - **Client-server model** for remote (cloud/edge) interactions via **Wi-Fi**.
  - **Data Formats**:
    - **ROS2 message types** for internal communication (e.g., `sensor_msgs/PointCloud2` for LiDAR data).
    - **Custom binary protocols** for cross-entity data exchange (e.g., ego vehicle state, object tracks).
  - **Security Considerations**:
    - **No explicit encryption** mentioned (assumed secure for prototype; future work may include TLS for Wi-Fi)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin is hosted and deployed as follows:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**:
    - Deployed on **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano** (onboard vehicle).
    - Runs **ROS2** with **Python/C++** nodes for perception and actuation.
  - **Digital Twin Entity**:
    - Deployed on **cloud/edge infrastructure** (not specified; assumed to be a **Linux-based server**).
    - Executes **ACC logic**, **data collection**, and **reporting** via **ROS2**.
  - **User Entity**:
    - Deployed on **remote workstations** (e.g., laptops) running a **ROS2 bridge** for visualization/control.
    - **3D Visualization** rendered via **ROS2 + Python/C++** (e.g., **PyQt** for UI framework).
  - **Data Storage**:
    - **SQL database** hosted on the **Digital Twin Entity** server for structured logging of time-series data.
  - **Middleware**: **ROS2** deployed in **Docker containers** (implied by modular ROS2 package structure)."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin integrates horizontally with the following external systems (not explicitly detailed in the document):
  - **Manufacturing Systems**: Potential integration with **ISO 23247-compliant manufacturing DTs** for **digital thread continuity**.
  - **AI Simulation Platforms**: Future work includes **AI agent training** via DT-generated data (e.g., Liu and David [15]).
  - **Vehicle Telematics**: Could interface with **OEM telematics systems** for fleet-wide monitoring.
  - **Simulation Tools**: **MATLAB/Simulink** integration for **high-fidelity perception models**.
  - **Cloud Services**: Potential integration with **cloud-based analytics** (e.g., AWS IoT, Azure Digital Twins) for scalable data storage/processing.
  The document does not specify explicit horizontal integrations beyond **ROS2-based modularity** and **SQL database logging**."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "The document does not explicitly address **data ownership and privacy**, but the following can be inferred:
  - **Data Ownership**:
    - **Ego vehicle state data** and **object tracks** are likely owned by the **vehicle operator** (e.g., OEM, fleet manager).
    - **Generated reports** may be shared with **developers** for troubleshooting (as per **R2**).
  - **Privacy Considerations**:
    - **No explicit privacy policies** mentioned; assumes **secure Wi-Fi communication** (though no encryption is specified).
    - **Remote management commands** (e.g., emergency braking) could pose **safety risks** if accessed by unauthorized parties.
  - **Ethical Implications**:
    - **Human-in-the-Loop** design (David and Bork [30]) implies **operator accountability** for remote actions.
    - **No mention of GDPR/CCPA compliance** for data storage (SQL database)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system adheres to the following standards:
  - **ISO 23247**: **Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework (Part 2: Reference Architecture)** as the foundational reference model, with deviations for automotive use (e.g., introduction of **Physical Twin Entity**).
  - **ISO 15622**: **Road Vehicles – Adaptive Cruise Control Systems** for ACC logic validation (Performance Class I).
  - **3GPP TS 22.185**: **Service Requirements for V2V Communication**, specifying **≤100 ms end-to-end latency**.
  - **IEC 62541 (OPC UA)**: Considered for **Data Translation FE** (though not implemented in this case study).
  - **ROS2**: **Robot Operating System 2** for middleware and inter-node communication.
  - **MATLAB/Simulink**: Industry-standard simulation tool for perception tasks (e.g., point cloud processing)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin incorporates the following security and safety considerations:
  - **Safety Mechanisms**:
    - **Emergency braking** implemented via **remote UI commands** with **≤100 ms latency** compliance.
    - **Clock synchronization (±100 ms)** ensures **temporal consistency** for critical operations.
    - **ISO 15622-compliant ACC logic** for **performance safety** (Performance Class I).
  - **Security Risks**:
    - **No explicit encryption** for Wi-Fi communication (assumed secure for prototype; future work may include **TLS**).
    - **Remote management commands** (e.g., emergency braking) could be exploited if **authentication/authorization** is lacking.
    - **Data integrity** relies on **ROS2 message validation** and **SQL database consistency checks**.
  - **Human-in-the-Loop Design**:
    - Follows **David and Bork’s taxonomy** as a **Fully Autonomous Digital Twin with Human-in-the-Loop**, ensuring **operator oversight** for critical actions.
  - **Safety-Critical Assumptions**:
    - **Hardware limitations** (e.g., ±100 ms clock accuracy) may introduce **minor temporal inconsistencies** but are mitigated by **latency constraints**.
    - **No fault-tolerant mechanisms** (e.g., redundancy) explicitly mentioned for hardware failures."
]
